title: The Election Facts
content:
Something I've learn over the past few weeks.

* More than half of the 400 constituencies (เขตเลือกตั้ง) has only one candidate.
* At least one constituency has NO candidate.
* Each constituency must have at least 20% voters turnout in order for the votes to be valid.
* A nationwide election costs approximately 2,200 million baht to organize.

Anything else?
